reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content:
보냉백이 이렇게 예쁘다니요! 겉에서 봤을때는 귀여운 미니백 같아서 보냉백인데도 멋스럽네요. 정말 마음에 들어요. 그냥 일상 데일리백으로도 사용할거에요. 반려견 산책때밈 시용하기 너무 아까움! 

1. 적당한 크기입니다. 아직 여름이 되지 않았지만 빨리 써보고 싶어서 물이랑, 간식, 물티슈 등 넣었어요. 산책할 때 필요한 것들 넣는데 알맞은 크기여서 정말 편해요. 

2. 가방 안쪽 수납도 양 옆에 고정밴드가 있어서 분류도 잘됩니다. 
가방 뒷편에도 카드 꽂기 딱 좋은 수납이 있구요. 

3. 저는 크로스끈도 구입했는데, 구매하는걸 추천해요. 간편히 매니까 훨씬 편해요. 

4. 천 재질도 튼튼하고, 무엇보다 내부 보냉도 꼼꼼하게 마감처리가 되서 믿을만해요. 

5. 이 브랜드에서는 옷을 많이 샀었는네 모두 질감도 좋고, 디자인도 깔끔하면서도 포인트가 있더라구요. 보냉백을 이런 디자인으로 제작해주다니! 감사할 따름이에요.
reviews.content_en:
I can't believe how pretty this insulated bag is! 😍 At first glance, it looks like a cute mini bag, so it has a stylish vibe even though it's a cooler bag. I absolutely love it. I'm going to use it as my everyday daily bag too. It feels like such a waste to only use it for dog walks!

1. The size is just right. Even though it's not summer yet, I was so eager to try it that I packed water, treats, wet wipes, and more. It's the perfect size for holding all the essentials for a walk, which makes it so convenient.

2. The inside of the bag has storage pockets with fixed bands on both sides, so organization is great. There's also a perfect little storage pocket on the back for cards.

3. I also purchased the crossbody strap, and I'd definitely recommend it. It's so much more convenient to carry casually.

4. The fabric is durable, and most importantly, the insulation is finished so meticulously inside that it's really trustworthy.

5. I've bought a lot of clothes from this brand before, and they all have great texture and clean designs with nice details. I can't believe they made an insulated bag with this kind of design! I'm just so grateful.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
이번에 운 좋게 #체험단에 당첨되어 SSFW 쿨레뜨백 블루 색상을 사용해 보게 되었습니다! 여름철 강아지와 산책할 때마다 시원한 물과 간식을 챙기는 게 일이었는데, 이 가방 하나로 고민이 싹 해결됐어요.
먼저 디자인이 정말 예뻐요. 보통 '보냉백' 하면 투박한 디자인이 떠오르기 마련인데, 쿨레뜨백은 세련된 SSFW만의 감성이 가득 담겨 있어서 그냥 데일리백으로 들어도 손색없을 정도예요. 특히 제가 선택한 블루 색상은 여름과 딱 어울리는 시원하고 화사한 톤이라 어떤 옷에도 포인트가 되어주더라고요.
기능성 면에서도 대만족입니다. 내부 보냉 단열재와 지퍼 클로징 덕분에 뙤약볕 아래에서도 우리 강아지 물과 간식을 시원하게 유지할 수 있었어요. 무엇보다 놀라운 건 무게인데, 약 150g의 초경량이라 짐을 넣어도 어깨에 무리가 전혀 없네요. 조절 가능한 크로스끈이 있어 두 손 자유롭게 산책할 수 있다는 점이 '보호자' 입장에서 정말 편했습니다.
생활 방수는 물론 내외부에 총 3개의 포켓이 있어 휴대폰이나 배변 봉투 같은 소지품을 따로 챙길 필요가 없어요. 실용성과 스타일을 모두 잡은 역대급 보냉백입니다. 올여름, 반려견과 더 시원하고 예쁜 산책을 하고 싶은 분들께 적극 추천드려요!
reviews.content_en:
I was lucky enough to win the #TrialTeam and got to try the SSFW Coolette Bag in blue! Every summer when I walk my dog, it's been such a hassle to pack cool water and treats, but this one bag solved all my worries.

First of all, the design is absolutely beautiful. When you hear 'insulated bag,' you usually think of bulky designs, but the Coolette Bag is packed with SSFW's refined sensibility, so it's stylish enough to carry as a regular daily bag. Especially the blue color I chose is a cool and bright tone that's perfect for summer, and it really adds a nice accent to any outfit.

I'm also extremely satisfied with the functionality. Thanks to the internal insulation and zipper closure, I could keep my dog's water and treats cool even under the blazing sun. What's most surprising is how light it is—at only about 150g, even with stuff packed in it, there's absolutely no burden on my shoulders. The adjustable crossbody strap means I can keep both hands free while walking, which has been really convenient from a pet parent's perspective.

It's water-resistant, and with a total of 3 pockets inside and out, I don't need to carry a separate pouch for my phone or waste bags. This is an all-time great insulated bag that combines both practicality and style. I highly recommend it to anyone who wants to enjoy a cooler and prettier walk with their pet this summer!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
강아지 산책가방 겸 제 나들이 가방으로 출시 전부터 마음속에 찜해놨던 쿨레뜨백!! 가장 포인트가 될 레드 들고 나들이 다녀왔는데 정말~ 대만족인 가방이라 리뷰를 남깁니다~~
일단.. 색이 정말 예쁜 레드라서 어떤 옷을 입어도,,어디서 사진을 찍어도,,긔냥 예쁘게 포인트가 되어주네요! 내부가 보냉 단열소재로 되어 있어 그렇지 겉감은 나일론이라 4계절 내내 예쁘게 들고다닐 수 있을 것 같아요!!이게 제일 큰 장점 같아요~! 
그리고 바리바리스타인 제 짐들도 이겨내는 수납력이에요. 알차게 들어가요! 핸드폰,지갑,립밤,핸드크림,보조배터리 등등 들어가고도 공간 많이 남았고.. 산책가방으로 쓸 때 아이들 물병이랑 간식통,똥츄 등 충분히 넣고도 남을 것 같아요. 다음주 주말에는 두 마리 데리고 동반카페 가려고하는데 그때도 포인트 가방으로 챙겨들고 나가려고 합니다 :) 
평소 내가 강아지 산책시키면서 멋도 내고 기능성도 되고 바리바리 짐도 싸고 싶던 보호자였다? 
쿨레뜨백 사시면 됩니다,,
reviews.content_en:
The Coolette Bag that I marked as a must-have in my wishlist before it even came out—as both a dog walking bag and my personal outing bag! I went out with the red version, which is the real eye-catcher, and I'm absolutely in love with it, so I'm leaving this review~

First of all, the color is such a beautiful red that it complements any outfit and looks stunning in photos no matter where I take them! Since the inside is insulated material, the outside is nylon, so I can carry it beautifully all four seasons long. That's definitely the biggest advantage!

And it has the storage capacity to handle all my stuff as a bit of a hoarder. Everything fits nicely! My phone, wallet, lip balm, hand cream, power bank, etc. all fit with plenty of space left over. When I use it as a walking bag, I think I could easily fit my dogs' water bottles, treat containers, and waste bags with room to spare. I'm planning to take both my dogs to a dog-friendly café next weekend, and I'm definitely bringing this as my accent bag!

I've always been that pet parent who wanted to look stylish, be practical, and pack efficiently while walking my dogs. So if that's you, just get the Coolette Bag!

reviews.name: 후추
reviews.content:
우선 별 다섯개 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 먼저 드리고 시작할게요!
이렇게 감성적인 보냉백은 처음 봤어요!
겉으로 봐서는 아무도 보냉백이라 생각 못할 예쁜 디자인! 일상 가방으로 쓰기에도 전혀 손색없어요🖤
올 여름 도시락 가방으로 쓰면 딱이겠어요ㅎㅎ
내부에는 그물 망으로 구분이 되어 있어서 자주 찾는 소품 넣기 좋았고요, 뒷 부분 포켓에는 카드 한장 쏙 넣어두니 가방 속에서 뭐 찾느라 허둥대지 않아도 되어 너무 좋았습니다🤗
크로스 끈은 탈부착 되어서 그때그때 활용하면 될 것 같아요! 저는 덜렁 메고 다니는 걸 좋아해서 크로스로 메고 다녔는데 착용감도 좋았어요:) 
파스텔톤의 하늘색이라 여기 저기 매치하기에도 좋았습니다! 내부가 보냉백일 뿐 사계절 내내 들고 다니기 너무 좋은 데일리백이라 추천드립니다!
reviews.content_en:
First, let me give you five stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐!
I've never seen such an aesthetic insulated bag before!
The design is so pretty that no one would think it's a cooler bag just by looking at it! It's totally fine to use as an everyday bag 🖤
It would be perfect as a lunch bag this summer!
The inside has a mesh divider for organizing frequently-used items, and the back pocket is perfect for slipping a card in so I don't have to rummage around inside the bag—that's so nice 🤗
The crossbody strap is detachable, so you can use it however you want at any time! I like carrying bags loosely, so I wore it crossbody and the fit was great :)
The pastel sky blue color is easy to match with different outfits! It's truly a wonderful daily bag to carry all four seasons, even though the inside is insulated. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
일단 #체험단 에 당첨되서 너무감사드립니다🫶
매번 칙칙한 블랙만 있었는데 화사한 레드가방이 생겨 넘 좋아요
가방자체가 너무 가볍고 키156에 크로스끈 거이 다 내리면 골반까지
오구 끈도 어깨에 있는지 없는지 가볍습니당
겉에 포켓이있어 카드지갑을 넣을수있고 갤럭시s26을 넣으면 반쯤들어가서
전 아마 핸드폰을 넣고 다닐거같아욤 가방안에 수납도 많이 되고 굿입니당👍👍
reviews.content_en:
First of all, thank you so much for selecting me for #TrialTeam 🫶
I always had plain black bags, but now I have such a bright red bag and I'm so happy!
The bag itself is so light, and at 5'1", when I lower the crossbody strap almost all the way, it reaches my hips. The strap is so light I can barely feel it on my shoulders!
There's a pocket on the outside where I can put my card and wallet, and when I put my Galaxy S26, it goes halfway in, so I think I'll probably carry my phone in the bag. There's lots of storage inside too—all good! 👍👍

reviews.name: 여름
reviews.content:
강아지랑 산책 갈 때도, 출근길에도, 야구장에도 어디든 다 잘 어울리는 쿨레뜨 백! 
보냉백이지만 보냉백 특유의 투박한 느낌 없이 정말  깔끔하고 예뻐요! 말하지 않으면 보냉백이라고 아무도 생각하지 못할 디자인 입니다! 그래서 저는 야구장에 들고 갔는데, 집에서 가져간 시원한 음료를 마실 수 있어서 너무 좋았어요! 알찬 수납력 덕분에 500ml 음료 1병+보조배터리+핸드폰+지갑+작은 파우치가 다 들어가고도 남아서 편하게 사용할 수 있을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: The Coolette Bag goes everywhere—on dog walks, to work, to the baseball stadium, anywhere! Even though it's an insulated bag, it doesn't have that typical bulky cooler bag feel. The design is really clean and beautiful! If you don't mention it, no one would think it's an insulated bag! That's why I brought it to the baseball stadium, and I was able to enjoy a cool drink I brought from home—it was fantastic! Thanks to the excellent storage capacity, I can fit a 500ml drink + power bank + phone + wallet + small pouch with plenty of room to spare, making it super convenient to use!

reviews.name: 해****
reviews.content:
강아지 산책용 가방으로 나왔다지만… 이젠 제 데일리백이 되어버렸어요!!
특히 안에 보냉백이 있어서 요즘같이 더운 날엔 시원한 음료수 하나 넣고 다니면 산책 중에도 상쾌함이 유지돼서 너무 좋아요.
원피스에 매칭해봤는데도 휘뚜루마뚜루 잘 어울리더라고요❤️
reviews.content_en:
While it came out as a dog walking bag, it's become my everyday bag now!!
Especially since it has insulation inside, on hot days like these, I just throw in a cool drink and during walks it keeps me feeling refreshed—it's so nice.
I even tried pairing it with a one-piece dress and it matched perfectly! ❤️

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
으악~!!!
너무예쁜 레드색
크로스도 가능하고 보냉도 되는 일석삼조
나들이갈때 폰이랑간식.물티슈 간단한거 다들어가요
곧 따뜻해져서 물따뜻해질까 걱정없어서 너무좋고
쨍한레드 자체가 포인트라 너무너무 예뻐요
잘쓸께요
reviews.content_en:
Wow!!!!
Such a gorgeous red color!
Can be worn crossbody, has insulation, and kills three birds with one stone!
When I go out, my phone, snacks, wet wipes, and other essentials all fit in!
With warm weather coming, I don't have to worry about the water getting warm anymore, which is amazing!
The vibrant red itself is such a statement piece, it's incredibly pretty!
I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 말이 필요 없음 무엇보다 가볍고 디자인, 색상, 사이즈, 보냉까지 완벽 그 자체!!
reviews.content_en: No words needed—it's lightweight, the design, color, size, and insulation are all absolutely perfect!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
안그래도  기존보냉백 너무 막써서 바꾸려고 했는데  마침 떳길래  바로구매했어요  ..제가 왜 크로스끈을 안삿는지 ㅜㅜ  후회중 ..
   실물 너무예뻐요 들어갈거 다들어갑니다 🩵
reviews.content_en:
I was already thinking about replacing my old insulated bag anyway, so when this came out, I bought it right away... I really regret not buying the crossbody strap 😭
The actual product is so pretty and fits everything! 🩵

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 여름이라 보냉 가능하면서 디자인도 넘 예쁘서 주문했는데 역시나 예쁘구 알차게 들어가고 가볍고 스트랩까지 추가 주문했는데 맨거 같지두 않게 가벼워여 걍 산책가방인줄 모르겠어요 가격이 사악하긴한데 다른색상도 주문하구 싶을정도로 만족합니다!!
reviews.content_en: Since it's summer, I ordered it because I wanted something with insulation and a beautiful design, and it's just as pretty as expected! Everything fits perfectly, it's lightweight, and I even added an extra strap, but it's so light you wouldn't know—I honestly forget it's just a walking bag! The price is a bit steep, but I'm so satisfied I'm already thinking about ordering it in other colors!
